payload.reason: all 4 acceptance criteria met: unknown subcommand emits canonical 'act: unknown subcommand X; run act help for the list'; bare act dep prints verb list; act dep --help / -h / help routes to dep usage with exit 0; flag-shaped token after dep routes to dep usage; tests cover act <typo>, act dep, act dep <typo>, act dep --help, act dep -h, act dep help, act dep --json
